name: studio.create_snapshot
description: Create a point-in-time snapshot of an Actium Studio site. Typically invoked before a destructive or bulk update as a safety net.
whenToUse: Pre-destructive-op safety: take a snapshot before a bulk update, settings change, or promote.
Scheduled safety checkpoint before an automated content-ops batch fires.
Operator explicitly requests a named checkpoint (e.g. 'snapshot before the Q2 launch push').
whenNotToUse: Snapshot taken within the last few minutes and nothing has changed since — wastes storage.
Caller actually wants to export the site — snapshots are internal; use an export skill if one exists.
Caller expects create_snapshot to also publish or promote — this is backup-only.
